title: Herbal Teas for Fever Blister on Lip: The Top 10 Options
description: Echinacea angustifolia tea is a natural remedy that may help with fever blisters on the lip. This tea is made from the root of the Echinacea plant, which has been used by Native Americans for centuries to boost the immune system. When you drink Echinacea angustifolia tea, it may help reduce the severity and duration of fever blisters. The tea contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, which may help soothe and calm the affected area. It may also have antiviral propertie...
